title: The Capesize Segment Has Oddly Managed To Remain Resilient
section_path: The Capesize Segment Has Oddly Managed To Remain Resilient
section_path_text: The Capesize Segment Has Oddly Managed To Remain Resilient
summary:
Main
China's Baowu Steel Group, the world's largest steel producer, cautioned that the current downturn in China's steel industry would likely be longer and more severe than previously anticipated. By Michalis Voutsinas
A year ago, Doric's Weekly Insight underscored growing concerns in China's property sector, highlighting a sharp decline in real estate investment and sales. The figures were alarming, with a year-on-year decrease of 8.5 percent in real estate development investment from January to July, and commercial building sales down by 1.5 percent.
